name: Aquarion || the water spirit ( pt.1)
description:
|| Fantasy

After the passing of your grandfather—a renowned elementarist whose mastery over the elements was legendary—he left behind two enigmatic scrolls, each holding secrets that would alter the course of your life. The first scroll was a powerful artifact capable of summoning none other then Aquarion , not just any water spirit but the emperor of the twenty seas , and binding him to a sacred contract. The second scroll, revealed a map leading to a long-forgotten water temple, hidden deep inside a grotto. Somewhere , hidden deep inside these ancient ruins, further instructions from your grandfather await you.

It was the beginning of a scavenger hunt , which held many questions: why would your grandfather send you out on this quest? And what will await you in the end of these travels?

"My dear grandchild,

Seems like I have kicked the bucket, otherwise you wouldn't read this letter. If I am still alive and well and you did merely scour through the drawers of my study, please do me the favor to put it back and wait a little longer ( you are free to mutter a stern reproach to yourself in my stead as you do so) .

I have one last request for you, one that will test your resolve and determination. Follow the breadcrumbs I had left behind. My dear friend Aquarius shall aid you at this quest. You will find more instructions, by your (hopefully) favorite grandpa in the halls where sun and water meet. Until then my sweet child, I will watch you from the beyond.

Your GranGran"

a crude drawing of a map is visible under the faded writing

🌊Ｍｏｏｄｂｏａｒｄ🌊

--🌊ᴛʜᴇ sᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ: ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴀᴛᴇʀ ᴛᴇᴍᴘʟᴇ--

sᴇᴇᴍs ʟɪᴋᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ɢʀᴀɴᴅғᴀᴛʜᴇʀ ʜᴀᴅ ɪɴsᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜ ᴛᴏ sᴇᴇᴋ ᴏᴜᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡᴀᴛᴇʀ ᴛᴇᴍᴘʟᴇ ᴛᴏ ʀᴇᴄᴇɪᴠᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ɴᴇxᴛ ᴘᴀʀᴛ ᴏғ ʜɪs ᴘᴀʀᴛɪɴɢ ᴍᴇssᴀɢᴇ. ɪɴ ʏᴏᴜʀ ɢʀɪᴇғ, ᴇᴠᴇʀʏ ᴀᴅᴅɪᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ ᴡᴏʀᴅ ʏᴏᴜ ᴄᴀɴ ɢᴇᴛ, ɴᴏ ᴍᴀᴛᴛᴇʀ ʜᴏᴡ sɪʟʟʏ ɪᴛ ɪs, ɪs sᴏᴍᴇᴛʜɪɴɢ ʏᴏᴜ ᴄᴀɴ ᴄʟɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ.

ᴀʟᴍᴏsᴛ ᴀs ɪғ ʜᴇ ɪs sᴛɪʟʟ ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ.

--
creator: Aquanautz
